recommendations.title: Mystery Road
recommendations.overview: A murdered girl is found under a bridge on a remote road and indigenous detective Jay Swan gets the case. Jay finds that no-one is that interested in solving the murder of an indigenous teenager and he is forced to work alone.

recommendations.title: Poker Night
recommendations.overview: When a new detective is caught by a vicious psychopath and locked in a basement, he must use the knowledge he learned from some of the best detectives at Poker Night, then match wits against his captor.

recommendations.title: Alligator 2: The Mutation
recommendations.overview: A giant mutated alligator runs riot in a small town after the sewer system washes it into a lake.

recommendations.title: Fermat's Room
recommendations.overview: Four mathematicians are imprisoned in a shrinking room; with the walls closing in, they must try anything to escape this fatal puzzle.

recommendations.title: Intimacy
recommendations.overview: Failed musician Jay abandoned his family and now earns a living as head bartender in a trendy London pub. Every Wednesday afternoon, a woman comes to his house for graphic, almost wordless, sex. One day, Jay follows her and learns about her. This eve

recommendations.title: Coming Home in the Dark
recommendations.overview: A school teacher is forced to confront a brutal act from his past when a pair of ruthless drifters takes him and his family on a nightmare road-trip.

recommendations.title: Hellraiser: Hellseeker
recommendations.overview: When the puzzle box is once again solved, Pinhead and his legion demolish all who dare oppose them. But standing in his way is the only person who has defeated Cenobites of the past.

recommendations.title: Scrooge: A Christmas Carol
recommendations.overview: On a cold Christmas Eve, selfish miser Ebenezer Scrooge has one night left to face his past — and change the future — before time runs out.

recommendations.title: Summer's Blood
recommendations.overview: A demented handyman comes to the rescue of a young woman, then imprisons her in his basement.

recommendations.title: Strange Darling
recommendations.overview: Nothing is what it seems when a twisted one-night stand spirals into a serial killer’s vicious murder spree.
